mapper.select: SELECT id, config_key, config_value, description, config_type, status, create_time, update_time FROM config WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO config ( config_key, config_value, description, config_type, status, create_time ) VALUES
( #{config.configKey}, #{config.configValue}, #{config.description}, #{config.configType}, #{config.status}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, config_key, config_value, description, config_type, status, create_time, update_time FROM config WHERE config_type = #{configType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, config_key, config_value, description, config_type, status, create_time, update_time FROM config WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY config_type, create_time DESC
